title: UBY-labeled cross-scale temporal database for Phanerozoic fossil occurrences, forcing events, astronomical records, and mass-extinction dynamics
description: A UBY-labeled, uncertainty-aware cross-scale temporal database integrating Paleobiology Database fossil occurrences and collections, chronostratigraphic records, astronomical records, Earth event benchmarks, forcing events, and derived mass-extinction dynamics. The dataset includes CSV, SQLite, and JSON outputs plus checksums, manifest, data dictionary, and quality-control reports.
notes: UBY labels are auxiliary time indices. Users must preserve and interpret the source time fields and uncertainty metadata. Geological fossil occurrence midpoints must not be treated as exact event times.
references: SIMBAD astronomical database, CDS, Strasbourg, https://simbad.cds.unistra.fr
